command:
cd /Users/yonatangross/coding/yonatangross/orchestkit
# Check git log for this test history — was it recently flaky on main?
git log --oneline -5 origin/main -- src/hooks/src/__tests__/async/dispatcher-e2e.test.ts 2>&1 | head
echo ""
# Run the failing test in isolation with higher verbosity to see if my new hooks cause the hang
cd src/hooks && npx vitest run src/__tests__/async/dispatcher-e2e.test.ts -t "stop:" 2>&1 | tail -10
